title: Warren-clan
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Warren-clans''' were [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] family units, usually consisting of a [[Gender/Legends|female]] and several husbands, along with their [[Youngling/Legends|young]].

{{Family-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar II: Jedi Healer]]''
*''[[Dark Nest II: The Unseen Queen]]''
*[[Crucible (novel)|''Crucible'']] {{Ab|Crucible (audiobook)}} {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2006-10-31 -->''[[The New Essential Guide to Alien Species]]''
*<!-- 2014-07-03 -->[[Star Wars: Age of Rebellion Core Rulebook|''Star Wars: Age of Rebellion'' Core Rulebook]]
